org.arakhne.neteditor.formalism.standard

Class StandardGraphException

  • java.lang.Object
    • java.lang.Throwable
      • java.lang.Exception
        • java.lang.RuntimeException
          • org.arakhne.neteditor.formalism.ModelException
            • org.arakhne.neteditor.formalism.standard.StandardGraphException
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Serializable

    public class StandardGraphException
extends ModelException
    Exception thrown when two model objects are in different graphs.
    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:02:58
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND
